steps.t: Eiricháv can be found in north west Câr Bronach. You should talk to Uzvát outside Eiricháv.
Eiricháv can be found in north west Câr Bronach. You should talk to Rethvárd outside Eiricháv.
Brathar Crack-helm can be found just south of Agal Dûn in Câr Bronach. You should seek out Brathar Crack-helm.
Brathar Crack-helm can be found just south of Agal Dûn in Câr Bronach. You should seek out Brathar Crack-helm.
Agal Dûn can be found in central Câr Bronach. You should travel to Agal Dûn.
Agal Dûn can be found in central Câr Bronach. You should defeat foes at Agal Dûn and rescue the two hillmen held as captives.
Múta can be found at Agal Dûn. You should talk to Múta at Agal Dûn.
